name: Vegetable Processors
description: Commercial vegetable processing equipment designed for efficient cutting, slicing, dicing, and shredding of vegetables in high-volume kitchen environments.

name: Potato Processors
description: Specialist potato processing machinery including peelers, chippers, and slicers built to handle large quantities of potatoes with speed and consistency.

name: Meat Processors
description: Professional meat processing equipment including mincers, slicers, and tenderisers designed for butcheries, delis, and commercial kitchens.

name: Meat Displays
description: Refrigerated meat display cases and counters that keep fresh and cured meats at optimal temperatures while maximising product visibility for customers.

name: Juice Processors
description: Commercial juicing and juice processing equipment including extractors, squeezers, and dispensers for restaurants, juice bars, and catering operations.

name: Refrigeration
description: Commercial refrigeration units including upright fridges, under-counter chillers, and walk-in cold rooms engineered for reliable food preservation in professional settings.

name: Cold Displays
description: Open and closed refrigerated display units ideal for showcasing chilled products such as beverages, dairy, salads, and deli items in retail and foodservice environments.

name: Pastry Displays
description: Elegant display cases designed to present pastries, cakes, and baked goods in an attractive and hygienic manner, suitable for bakeries, cafes, and patisseries.

name: Ice Cream Displays
description: Specialised freezer display units for gelato, sorbet, and ice cream, maintaining precise low temperatures while providing excellent product visibility and easy access.

name: Warm Displays
description: Heated display units that keep hot food items at safe serving temperatures, perfect for displaying pies, rotisserie items, and prepared hot foods in retail or foodservice settings.

name: Ovens
description: A comprehensive range of commercial ovens including convection, combi-steam, deck, and pizza ovens built for precision cooking and high-volume output in professional kitchens.

name: Bakery Preparation
description: Bakery preparation equipment including dough mixers, proofers, dividers, and moulders designed to streamline production in artisan and industrial baking operations.

name: Buffet & Servery
description: Buffet and servery solutions including bain-maries, food warmers, sneeze guards, and serving counters tailored for hotels, canteens, events, and self-service environments.

name: Induction Cookers
description: High-performance commercial induction cookers offering precise temperature control, energy efficiency, and rapid heating for professional kitchens and live cooking stations.

name: GN Containers
description: Gastronorm containers in a full range of standard sizes and materials, compatible with commercial ovens, bain-maries, and refrigeration units for versatile food storage and service.

name: Fast Food
description: Dedicated fast food equipment including grills, toasters, heat lamps, and holding units engineered for quick-service restaurants and high-throughput food operations.

name: Fryers
description: Commercial deep fryers in countertop and floor-standing models, offering precise oil temperature management and high capacity output for chips, chicken, and fried foods.

name: Beverage Equipment
description: A wide range of professional beverage equipment including coffee machines, blenders, water dispensers, and tea urns for cafes, restaurants, hotels, and office environments.

name: Food Transport
description: Insulated food transport containers, trolleys, and delivery systems designed to maintain safe food temperatures during transit for catering, healthcare, and events.

name: Hygiene
description: Commercial hygiene equipment and consumables including hand wash stations, sanitiser dispensers, and cleaning systems to uphold health and safety standards in food environments.

name: Rational Tablets
description: Genuine Rational cleaning tablets formulated for use with Rational combi ovens, ensuring thorough and efficient automated cleaning cycles and prolonged appliance performance.

name: Rational Accessories
description: Official Rational accessories including trays, racks, and gastronorm supports designed to expand the functionality and versatility of Rational combi-steam ovens.

name: Cleaning Solutions
description: Professional-grade cleaning solutions and detergents for commercial kitchen equipment, surfaces, and utensils, meeting food-safe and industry hygiene compliance standards.

name: Shelving & Storage
description: Heavy-duty shelving units, racking systems, and storage solutions built for commercial kitchens, storerooms, and cold rooms to organise ingredients and equipment efficiently.

name: Kitchen Smalls
description: Essential small kitchen tools and utensils including pots, pans, chopping boards, knives, and preparation accessories for everyday use in professional culinary environments.
